name: Shopify - Online Resources and Help Centre
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once Retail Express has been connected to Shopify it's time to populate the online store."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shopify has an online Help Centre available to guide users through the process; this same Help Centre is also directly available through the search tool from within admin."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/", "children": [{"text": "Click here to visit the Shopify Help Centre"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Some useful links include:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/products/", "children": [{"text": "Products"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/payments/", "children": [{"text": "Payments"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/shipping/", "children": [{"text": "Shipping"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/orders/", "children": [{"text": "Orders"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/customers/", "children": [{"text": "Customers"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/reports-and-analytics/", "children": [{"text": "Analytics"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/productivity-tools/", "children": [{"text": "Productivity Tools"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://help.shopify.com/manual/promoting-marketing/", "children": [{"text": "Marketing and discounts"}]}]}]}]}]
